errors.message: Priya's surname is stated incorrectly in scene text, contradicting the character bible where she is named 'Priya Chandran'.
errors.fix: Update the description text to 'Priya Chandran' or remove the surname reference entirely to avoid contradiction.

warnings.message: estimatedPlayTime (13) does not obviously correspond to the sum of scene durations (23 scenes x duration:1 = 23 units). If duration is meant to be in minutes, the metadata is inconsistent; if duration is an arbitrary weight, this should be documented.
warnings.suggestion: Clarify the unit for 'duration' and recompute estimatedPlayTime accordingly, or add a comment/field explaining the relationship.

warnings.message: seasonId 'season-1' does not correspond to any explicit season ID in the world data — the world only lists a display string ('Season 1: First Year'), not a season object with an id field.
warnings.suggestion: Either add season objects with explicit IDs to the world schema, or document the season-1 -> 'Season 1: First Year' mapping convention so downstream tooling can resolve it reliably.

warnings.message: choiceDialogue for choice-4 option 'b' uses a field named 'reasoning' that isn't used anywhere else in choiceDialogue.options across the episode (other options only use 'id' and 'text').
warnings.suggestion: Remove the nonstandard 'reasoning' field or standardize it as an optional field used consistently (e.g., as a stage-direction/subtext field) across all choiceDialogue options.

warnings.message: branchDialogue entries key off three archetypal branchIds ('branch-genuine', 'branch-popularity', 'branch-self-protective') attached to each ending scene, but no explicit logic/threshold is defined anywhere in the episode data for how a player's actual choice combination (which can mix across all three archetypes, e.g., sit with Priya but then join Jordan's mockery) maps to exactly one of these three branchIds. This is a design/runtime resolution gap that could cause ambiguous or undefined branch selection for non-canonical (mixed) playthroughs.
warnings.suggestion: Define an explicit trait-threshold or dominant-path calculation (e.g., based on cumulative EMPATHY/CONFIDENCE/ADAPTABILITY scores) documented either in the episode schema or the rendering pipeline's spec, and add a documented fallback/default branch for tied or ambiguous cases.

warnings.message: choice-5 has only 2 options (a, b) while every other major choice (1-4, 6) has 3 options. Not an error, but an inconsistency in choice format across the episode that may read as a discontinuity in pacing/complexity.
warnings.suggestion: Consider adding a third 'middle ground' option for stylistic consistency with other choice points, though this is optional given the narrower thematic scope of that decision.

recommendations: Add a short glossary/mapping doc clarifying how branchDialogue branchIds get selected at runtime based on cumulative trait scores or path history.
Standardize optional dialogue-object fields (action, emotion, reasoning) so all dialogue lines use a consistent set of optional keys.
Double check all character full-name references in scene descriptions against the character bible in a final pass before status changes from DRAFT to IN_REVIEW.
